scripts.build:exe: node scripts/embed-ui.js && pkg server/index.js --targets node18-win-x64 --output dist/FileSharing.exe
scripts.build:host: powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File scripts/make-icon.ps1 && dotnet publish host/TossHost.csproj -c Release -r win-x64 -p:PublishSingleFile=true -p:SelfContained=true -p:IncludeNativeLibrariesForSelfExtract=true -o dist
scripts.pack: npm run build:exe && npm run build:host && powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File scripts/pack.ps1
